title: koeleria cristata f. grandiflora
intro: Koeleria cristata f. grandiflora, also known as tall hair grass, is a sub-species of the Koeleria cristata plant, a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Koeleria cristata f. grandiflora lie in its high concentration of flavonoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health due to its ability to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Koeleria cristata f. grandiflora can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
